description: Apify is a cloud platform and marketplace for running web scraping, automation, and data extraction tools called Actors. It also provides hosted storage, scheduling, and related tooling for building and operating those workflows.
summary: Apify exposes a REST HTTP API (v2), a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.apify.com/`, and the `apify` CLI; developer authentication is centered on an Apify API token, with MCP also supporting OAuth sign-in in compatible clients.
